User.title: User
User.description: An ERP system user, representing either an Admin or a Salesman

Area.title: Area
Area.description: A custom geographical territory or area managed in the system

name.description: The unique name of the area

Customer.title: Customer
Customer.description: A customer profile including contact details and financial balances

areaId.description: The unique identifier of the area where customer belongs

phone.description: Mobile or phone number associated with the customer

openingDue.description: The initial outstanding dues during setup

currentDue.description: The current outstanding dues based on running entries

SalesEntry.title: SalesEntry
SalesEntry.description: A daily transactional record storing invoices, sales amounts, and cash/check collections

year.description: The active fiscal or calendar year of the transaction

customerId.description: The reference identifier of the customer

areaId.description: Auto-detected base area identifier of the customer

saleAmount.description: The total sales amount for the transaction

collection.description: The combined cash and check collection amount (Cash + Check)

cash.description: The cash portion of the collection

check.description: The check portion of the collection

previousDue.description: The customer's due balance prior to this ticket transaction

currentDue.description: The newly calculated current due: Previous Due + Sale Amount - Collection

remarks.description: Optional remarks or memos for the entry

salesmanId.description: The user identifier who submitted this transaction record

salesmanName.description: Name of the salesman who facilitated the interaction

users.description: Global register of systems users containing administrators and salesmen

areas.description: Custom geographic areas or routes managed by administrators

customers.description: Active ledger registry listings for billing partners

sales.description: Chronological history of invoices, returns, and sales transactions
